title: Green Fireworks!
description: A green colored texture for fireworks! Works with crossbows too!
body: Hello! This is my first resource pack I have made to post online.  I am starting pretty simple with the Green Firework texture! It also makes fireworks shot with the crossbow the same green firework.  I plan to do more things in the future, so please let me know if you like it, or want it for other versions of minecraft. Any recommendations are welcome as well! Thank you!
